last_packet.objective: Read src/main.py lines 1 to 40 and return the list of top-level subcommands registered by build_parser().
last_packet.scope: Read src/main.py only. Do not edit any file. Do not run tests.
last_packet.branch_policy: Do not create or switch branches.
last_packet.reporting_contract: Return the subcommand names as a JSON array under the key 'subcommands'.
last_packet.escalation_policy: Stop if Ollama is unavailable or a required tool fails repeatedly.
